title: MeshCombineFaceGroupsFeatures Object
description: Collection that provides access to all of the existing mesh combine face groups features in a component and supports the ability to create new mesh face group combine features.

methods.name: add
methods.description: Creates a mesh combine face groups feature.

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

methods.name: createInput
methods.description: Creates a MeshCombineFaceGroupsFeatureInput object. Use properties and methods on this object to define the mesh combine face groups feature you want to create and then use the add method, passing in the MeshCombineFaceGroupsFeatureInput object.

methods.name: item
methods.description: Function that returns the specified mesh combine face groups feature using an index into the collection.

methods.name: itemByName
methods.description: Function that returns the specified MeshCombineFaceGroups feature using the name of the feature.

properties.name: count
properties.description: The number of mesh combine face groups features in the collection.

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

add.title: MeshCombineFaceGroupsFeatures.add Method
add.description: Creates a mesh combine face groups feature.
add.return_description: Returns the newly created MeshCombineFaceGroupsFeatureInput object or null if the creation failed. Returns nothing in the case where the feature is non-parametric.

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: A MeshCombineFaceGroupsFeatureInput object that defines the desired mesh combine face groups feature. Use the createInput method to create a new MeshCombineFaceGroupsFeatureInput object and then use methods on it (the MeshCombineFaceGroupsFeatureInput object) to define the mesh combine face groups feature.

classType.title: MeshCombineFaceGroupsFeatures.classType Method
classType.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().
classType.return_description: Returns a string indicating the type of the object.

createInput.title: MeshCombineFaceGroupsFeatures.createInput Method
createInput.description: Creates a MeshCombineFaceGroupsFeatureInput object. Use properties and methods on this object to define the mesh combine face groups feature you want to create and then use the add method, passing in the MeshCombineFaceGroupsFeatureInput object.
createInput.return_description: Returns the newly created MeshCombineFaceGroupsFeatureInput object or null if the creation failed.

parameters.name: inputFaceGroups
parameters.description: A array with face groups belonging to the same mesh. The mesh can be in either a parametric or direct modeling design.

item.title: MeshCombineFaceGroupsFeatures.item Method
item.description: Function that returns the specified mesh combine face groups feature using an index into the collection.
item.return_description: Returns the specified item or null if an invalid index was specified.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: The index of the item within the collection to return. The first item in the collection has an index of 0.

itemByName.title: MeshCombineFaceGroupsFeatures.itemByName Method
itemByName.description: Function that returns the specified MeshCombineFaceGroups feature using the name of the feature.
itemByName.return_description: Returns the specified item or null if the specified name was not found.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the feature within the collection to return. This is the name seen in the timeline.

count.title: MeshCombineFaceGroupsFeatures.count Property
count.description: The number of mesh combine face groups features in the collection.

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = meshCombineFaceGroupsFeatures_var.count

isValid.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

objectType.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object. It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():
